public_sources.title: Acme Robotics opens European distribution hub
public_sources.raw_text: Acme Robotics opened a European distribution hub in May 2026. The hub supports same-week delivery for enterprise warehouse customers and is staffed by an existing regional operations team.

proposed_excerpts.quote: Acme Robotics opened a European distribution hub in May 2026.
The hub supports same-week delivery for enterprise warehouse customers

proposed_claims.text: Acme Robotics opened a European distribution hub in May 2026.
Acme Robotics supports same-week delivery for enterprise warehouse customers from its European hub.

proposed_account_objects.title: European distribution hub opened
proposed_account_objects.summary: Acme Robotics opened a European distribution hub supporting same-week enterprise delivery.
